description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: RSVP to a free in-person beginner-level English meetup happening this coming Saturday after 5:00 pm within 5 km of your location, choosing the one with the highest rating among the matching results.

target_names: Saturday Beginner Chat  Free Coffee Meetup

tasks.instruction: Join an online English conversation event happening today between 7:00 and 9:00 pm that has at most 8 participants and at least 3 reviews, then send one message to the host asking if the meetup is suitable for upper-intermediate speakers.

expected_values.message_text: Hi, is this meetup suitable for upper-intermediate speakers?

tasks.instruction: Sign up for a new learner account at intermediate level, set your interests to Business English and Travel & Culture, and adjust notifications so that only weekly summaries are enabled.

tasks.instruction: Among paid English workshops scheduled for next week that cost no more than $25, compare the first two highest-rated results and add the one with the longer duration to your saved events.

tasks.instruction: As an organizer, create and publish a new in-person English conversation event for intermediate learners scheduled on the 20th of next month at 6:30 pm in a library room, with a $5 attendance fee and a capacity of 12 participants.

expected_values.title: Saturday Conversation Club  Intermediate
expected_values.description: Informal conversation practice focused on everyday topics and speaking confidence.

tasks.instruction: Select the lower-priced monthly membership plan (not the most expensive one), apply the available 10% welcome promo code, and complete the payment form to start that plan.

tasks.instruction: Bookmark three free online advanced-level English meetups happening in the next 7 days that start at or after 6:00 pm, then open them from your saved events in calendar view.

tasks.instruction: Update your profile so that the preferred meeting location is "Downtown Library", availability is limited to MondayThursday evenings, and your learning goal states that you want to improve your IELTS speaking score to 7.0 within 6 months, then save the changes.

expected_values.learning_goal_text: Improve IELTS speaking score to 7.0 within 6 months.

tasks.instruction: Enroll in a pronunciation-focused multi-session course with at least 4 sessions, an average rating of 4.0 or higher, and a total cost under $60, then add all of its sessions to the site calendar and open the calendar view.
